chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-438 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of Misc. No.26937/2024 2. For hearing of main case 26.08.2025 Ms. Sara Malkani, advocate for the petitioners Mr. Tariq, advocate holds brief for Mr. Nadir Khan Burdi, advocate for respondent Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG --------- The main grievance of the learned counsel for the petitioners was that the petitioners had not been paid the minimum wage of Rs.37,000/-. The learned AAG informed this Court that minimum wage is now being paid at the rate of Rs.40,000/-. As such, this petition has served its purpose and is accordingly dismissed as infructuous alongwith pending application. However, the Government of Sindh shall ensure that the minimum wage of Rs. 40,000/- is duly enforced. Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Nadir*
